brand_voice_note: Understated and craft-forward, speaking to durable, American-made bags that move easily between work and weekend and only get better with age.

concepts.primary_text:
One tote. Office, gym, and carry-on all handled.

The Pablo Tote is a take-anywhere tote with curb appeal, made from ultra-durable nylon that's lightweight, waterproof, and easy to wipe clean.

The vegetable-tanned Vachetta leather straps darken with age into a rich honey patina, so it looks better the more you carry it.
concepts.headline: The Take-Anywhere Tote
concepts.why_it_works: The Pablo Tote's single strongest selling point is its everyday versatility, so leading with the one-bag-does-it-all outcome speaks directly to a commuter who wants to simplify.

concepts.primary_text:
Tired of a bulky backpack that swallows everything and looks like gym gear?

The Pablo Backpack keeps a slim profile while holding what your day actually needs, built from ultra-durable ballistic nylon that's waterproof and lightweight.

Premium vegetable-tanned leather accents that only get better with age, so it works for the office and the workout alike.
concepts.headline: Slim Profile, Serious Space
concepts.why_it_works: The everyday friction with backpacks is choosing between capacity and a clean look, and the Pablo's slim-but-spacious build resolves exactly that.

concepts.primary_text:
At $158, will it actually last? Yes.

The Kennedy Duffel is handmade in New York from heavyweight water-repellent canvas, vegetable-tanned Vachetta leather straps, and a waterproof nylon lining. Built for the long haul.

Made in the USA and backed by a warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship, plus free returns within 30 days on unused items.
concepts.headline: Built For The Long Haul
concepts.why_it_works: A durable duffel at an accessible price invites doubt about quality, so naming the materials, warranty, and returns policy removes the main hesitation before purchase.
